Sample_Name_i18n.pt-BR: Hélice de avião movido a elástico
Sample_Name_i18n.es: Hélice de avión impulsado por goma

Sample_Description: The two-blade rubber-band airplane example from demo_collection(), with high pitch and clockwise direction.

Sample_Description_i18n.en: The two-blade rubber-band airplane example from demo_collection(), with high pitch and clockwise direction.
Sample_Description_i18n.pt-BR: Exemplo de avião movido a elástico de demo_collection(), com duas pás, passo elevado e direção horária.
Sample_Description_i18n.es: Ejemplo de avión impulsado por goma de demo_collection(), con dos palas, paso alto y giro horario.
Sample_Description_i18n.fr: Exemple d’avion à élastique de demo_collection(), à deux pales, fort pas et rotation horaire.
Sample_Description_i18n.de: Gummimotor-Flugzeugbeispiel aus demo_collection() mit zwei Blättern, hoher Steigung und Drehrichtung +1.
Sample_Description_i18n.ru: Пример самолёта с резиномотором из demo_collection(): две лопасти, большой шаг и направление +1.

Source.Adaptation_Notes: The separate 7 mm hub cylinder is represented by Hub_Length=7 mm; no bore was present.
